# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: 'konghq.org/v1'  # Define the Kong version (required)
kind: 'KongPlugin'          # Declare that we are defining a plugin here, not an API resource or service definition itself  
metadata:                    # Metadata for this specific instance of our configuration file is required to be unique within its parent object. It can contain any information you want related with the Kong Plugin (required) 
    name: 'auth-nologin'     # Name that uniquely identifies your plugin in Kubernetes and other contexts  
specs:                      # Specifications for this specific instance of our configuration file are required to be unique within its parent object. They contain all the information about how you want Kong Plugin (required) 
    enabled: true             # Enable or disable a particular feature/plugin in Kubernetes and other contexts  
        type: 'access'       # Specify which plugin this is, it can either be access for basic auth plugins. You may need to use different types based on your specific needs (required) 
    configs:                  # Configuration details of the particular feature/plugin in Kubernetes and other contexts  
        - key: 'enabled'     # Key that uniquely identifies a configuration detail within this plugin instance, it can be anything related with access plugins. You may need to use different keys based on your specific needs (required) 
          value: true         # Value of the particular feature/plugin in Kubernetes and other contexts
